hero.title: React SPA Boilerplate
hero.description: Production-ready starter with Vite, TypeScript, Zustand, Tailwind, i18n, Vitest, and switchable design systems baked in.

stack.label: Stack
stack.title: What's included
stack.description: Every dependency was chosen deliberately — nothing is here for padding.
stack.react: UI library with concurrent features and the new JSX transform.
stack.typescript: Strict type checking with path aliases configured out of the box.
stack.vite: SWC-powered dev server and build tool. Cold start under 300ms.
stack.zustand: Minimal state management with persist middleware and the slice pattern.
stack.tailwind: Utility-first CSS with the brand palette exposed as Tailwind tokens.
stack.i18next: i18n with locales bundled at build time via Vite glob import (no runtime fetch) plus browser language detection (en-US + vi-VN).
stack.vitest: Fast Vite-native unit testing with Testing Library and jsdom.

designSystem.label: Design system
designSystem.title: Color palette
designSystem.description: Tokens for the active <c>{{design}}</c> design — surfaces, text, and accents shown for both light and dark. Tokens are CSS custom properties plus the Tailwind <c>brand.*</c> palette; each design is a file in <c>src/designs/</c>. Full spec in <c>design-specs/</c>.

typography.label: Typography
typography.title: Type scale
typography.bodySample: Body text uses DM Sans for UI clarity. Generous 1.6 line-height creates a literary reading experience closer to a book than a dashboard.

uikit.label: Components
uikit.title: UI kit
uikit.cmdHint: Open with ⌘K / Ctrl+K, or click below.
uikit.description: Every component is accessible, dark-mode ready, and uses the design tokens. Click any interactive element to see it live.
uikit.popoverBody: Popover content traps focus and closes on Escape or outside click.
uikit.cardBody: Body content sits between the optional header and footer slots.
uikit.dropdownHint: Fully custom — keyboard navigable, terracotta selection.
uikit.fileHint: PDF or PNG, up to 5 MB
uikit.emptyDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
uikit.alertInfoBody: Your plan resets on the 1st of each month.
uikit.alertSuccessBody: Your changes have been saved successfully.
uikit.alertWarningBody: You've used 90% of your storage quota.
uikit.alertErrorBody: Unable to connect — check your network and retry.
uikit.drawerDescription: A slide-in panel anchored to the edge of the screen.
uikit.drawerBody: Drawer content goes here — navigation, filters, or detail views.
uikit.toastDescription: Auto-dismissing floating notification — fires from the bottom-right.
uikit.dialogDescription: Portal modal with Escape / Enter keyboard handling and focus trap.
uikit.dialogMessage: Are you sure you want to continue? This action cannot be undone.
uikit.accordionA1: A production-ready React SPA starter with Vite, TypeScript, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, i18n, and switchable design systems.
uikit.accordionQ2: Can I use this for commercial projects?
uikit.accordionA2: Yes — it's MIT licensed. Use it freely for personal or commercial work.
uikit.accordionQ3: How do I add a new page?
uikit.accordionA3: Create src/pages/MyPage/MyPage.tsx and an index.ts barrel, then import and render it in App.tsx.
uikit.tabOverviewContent: The overview tab shows a summary of your project status, recent activity, and key metrics at a glance.
uikit.tabSettingsContent: Configure your project settings, integrations, environment variables, and team permissions here.
uikit.tabLogsContent: Inspect build logs, deployment history, and runtime errors from this tab.
uikit.tabBillingContent: Manage your subscription, view invoices, and update payment details.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.title: Extending this boilerplate
workflow.step1Body: Create <mono>src/pages/MyPage/MyPage.tsx</mono> + <mono>index.ts</mono> barrel, then register a route in <mono>src/router.tsx</mono> — add a <mono>createRoute</mono> and include it in the route tree (TanStack Router).
workflow.step2Body: Create <mono>src/store/my-slice.ts</mono> following the <mono>UISlice</mono> pattern. Spread it in <mono>store.ts</mono>, add persisted fields to <mono>partialize</mono>, bump <mono>version</mono>, and add a migration step in <mono>migrate.ts</mono>.
workflow.step3Body: Add keys to <mono>src/locales/en-US/main.json</mono> and mirror to <mono>vi-VN/main.json</mono>. Call <mono>useTranslation()</mono> in any component.
workflow.step4Body: Use <mono>api.get('/endpoint')</mono> from <mono>src/api/client.ts</mono>. Set <mono>VITE_API_BASE_URL</mono> in <mono>.env</mono>. Catch <mono>ApiError</mono> for typed error handling.
workflow.step5Body: Create <mono>src/components/MyComponent/MyComponent.tsx</mono> + <mono>index.ts</mono> barrel. Use the brand palette — <mono>brand.*</mono> Tailwind tokens or CSS vars like <mono>var(--accent)</mono>.
workflow.step6Body: Create <mono>src/components/MyComponent/MyComponent.test.tsx</mono>. Use Testing Library + Vitest. Run <mono>pnpm test</mono> to validate.
